headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Honeywell Intl, Lowers Price Target to $245
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Chris Snyder   maintains Honeywell Intl (NASDAQ:HON) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $490 to $245.
